MODULE: cosmos.agents.critic_agent
FILE: cosmos/agents/critic_agent.py (1182 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Critic Agent - Quality Assurance & Review

Novel Approaches:
1. Multi-Dimensional Scoring - Evaluate across multiple quality axes
2. Iterative Refinement Loops - Guided improvement cycles
3. Comparative Analysis - Compare against examples/standards
4. Constructive Feedback - Actionable improv

CLASSES:
- CollaborationMetrics: Metrics for evaluating multi-agent collaboration quality.

Tracks both individua
  Methods: def handoff_success_rate(self) -> float
  Methods: def synergy_coefficient(self) -> float
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- HandoffEvent: Record of a handoff between agents.
- QualityDimension(Enum): Dimensions of quality to evaluate.
- ReviewType(Enum): Types of reviews.
- QualityScore: Score for a single quality dimension.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- Review: Complete review of an artifact.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- RefinementResult: Result of an iterative refinement.
- CriticAgent: Quality assurance agent that reviews and helps refine outputs.

Features:
- Mult
  Methods: async def review(self, content: str, review_type: ReviewType=ReviewType.OUTPUT, context: Optional[st
  Methods: async def refine(self, content: str, review_type: ReviewType=ReviewType.OUTPUT, refiner_fn: Optional
  Methods: async def compare(self, artifacts: list[str], review_type: ReviewType=ReviewType.OUTPUT, context: Op
  Methods: async def verify_requirements(self, content: str, requirements: list[str], review_type: ReviewType=R
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
  Methods: def start_collaboration(self, collaboration_id: str, agents: list[str]) -> CollaborationMetrics
  Methods: def record_handoff(self, collaboration_id: str, from_agent: str, to_agent: str, task_context: str, s
  Methods: async def record_contribution(self, collaboration_id: str, agent_id: str, contribution: str, review_
